query:
-- Create wa_conversations table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wa_conversations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  sessionId VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  contactId INT,
  remoteJid VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  conversationKey VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  phoneE164 VARCHAR(32),
  phoneDigits VARCHAR(32),
  phoneLast11 VARCHAR(16),
  lastMessageAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  lastMessagePreview TEXT,
  lastMessageType VARCHAR(32),
  lastFromMe BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  lastStatus VARCHAR(32),
  unreadCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('open', 'pending', 'resolved', 'closed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  contactPushName VARCHAR(128),
  mergedIntoId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_wc_tenant_session (tenantId, sessionId, lastMessageAt),
  INDEX idx_wc_tenant_contact (tenantId, contactId),
  INDEX idx_wc_tenant_jid (tenantId, sessionId, remoteJid),
  INDEX idx_wc_phone (tenantId, phoneE164),
  INDEX idx_wc_merged (mergedIntoId),
  UNIQUE KEY uq_wc_conversation_key (conversationKey)
);

-- Create wa_identities table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wa_identities (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  sessionId VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  contactId INT,
  remoteJid VARCHAR(128),
  waId VARCHAR(128),
  phoneE164 VARCHAR(32),
  confidenceScore INT DEFAULT 60,
  firstSeenAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  lastSeenAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_wi_tenant_session (tenantId, sessionId),
  INDEX idx_wi_contact (tenantId, contactId),
  INDEX idx_wi_phone (tenantId, phoneE164)
);

-- Create wa_audit_log table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wa_audit_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  action VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  entityType VARCHAR(64),
  entityId VARCHAR(128),
  inputsJson JSON,
  outputsJson JSON,
  correlationId VARCHAR(64),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_wal_tenant_action (tenantId, action, createdAt),
  INDEX idx_wal_correlation (correlationId)
);

-- Add waConversationId column to messages table
ALTER TABLE messages ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS waConversationId INT;
ALTER TABLE messages ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_msg_wa_conv (waConversationId);

-- Add waConversationId column to deals table
ALTER TABLE deals ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS waConversationId INT;
ALTER TABLE deals ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_deals_wa_conv (waConversationId);

-- Add phoneE164, phoneDigits, phoneLast11 columns to contacts table
ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phoneE164 VARCHAR(32);
ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phoneDigits VARCHAR(32);
ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phoneLast11 VARCHAR(16);

ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phoneLast11 VARCHAR(16);
